info.description: YouTube/Vimeo embed URL or direct uploaded video with optional poster images

desktopImage.description: Optional desktop poster image. Used as fallback when URL cannot be embedded or for direct-uploaded video poster.

content-manager.description: Optional desktop poster image. Used as fallback when the URL cannot be embedded or for direct-uploaded video poster.

mobileImage.description: Optional mobile poster image. Leave empty to reuse desktop poster.

content-manager.description: Optional mobile poster image. Leave empty to reuse desktop poster.

videoFile.description: Optional direct video upload from Strapi Media Library. If provided, this is used instead of URL embed.

content-manager.description: Optional direct video upload from Strapi Media Library. If provided, this is used instead of URL embed.

url.description: Optional YouTube or Vimeo URL. Use this when not uploading a video file. Vimeo player is fully supported.

content-manager.description: Optional YouTube or Vimeo URL. Use this when not uploading a video file. Vimeo player is fully supported.
